name: BGM Mixer
description: Mix a voice track with a background music track, using beat-aware ducking and beat-snapped cuts (CutClaw / madmom inspired). Falls back to a deterministic stub beat tracker when madmom is not installed so the plugin works on any machine.

description_i18n.zh: 把人声 (旁白 / 对话) 和背景音乐合成一条最终音频：自动 ducking 让人声始终清晰、自动找节拍切口让 BGM 不会硬切。没装 madmom 也能跑 (使用确定性 stub beat tracker)。
description_i18n.en: Mix a voice track with a background music track, using beat-aware ducking and beat-snapped cuts (CutClaw / madmom inspired). Falls back to a deterministic stub beat tracker when madmom is not installed so the plugin works on any machine.

author: OpenAkita
